// Selenium WebDriver Test WebDriver driver = new ChromeDriver(); driver.get("https://example.com"); WebElement username = driver.findElement( By.id("username")); username.sendKeys("fahid"); WebElement password = driver.findElement( By.id("password")); password.sendKeys("qa_tester"); driver.findElement( By.tagName("button")).click(); Assert.assertEquals( driver.getCurrentUrl(), "/dashboard");

About Me

My QA Journey

Delivering quality across BFSI, ERP, AI and web application domains

I'm Fahid P, a results-driven Senior QA Tester with 3.5+ years of experience delivering quality across BFSI, ERP, AI Projects, and web application domains. I have a proven track record in end-to-end test planning, automation, and team leadership.

My expertise spans functional, regression, SIT, and UAT testing with a strong foundation in API testing, data validation, and compliance monitoring. Currently leading a team of 5 QA testers at Bairuha Tech, ensuring 100% transaction accuracy and SLA adherence in production releases.

ISTQB Certified
Certified Agile Tester
API Testing Expert
QA Team Lead

Experience Timeline

Mar 2024 - Present

Senior QA Tester

Bairuha Tech Pvt. Ltd

Leading end-to-end QA activities for BFSI and web applications. Managing and mentoring a team of 5 QA testers. Validating 100% transaction accuracy.

Feb 2023 - Mar 2024

QA Analyst

Skyislimit.in, Kochi

Conducted functional and exploratory testing, reducing bug count by 80%. Achieved 99% data accuracy through SQL-based validation.

2020 - 2023

Education & Early Career

BCA Graduate

Bachelor of Computer Applications completed in 2023. Built foundation in software development and testing methodologies.

Testing projects across BFSI, ERP, E-Commerce and AI domains

BFSI Application Testing

ERP SQL Selenium

ERP System Testing

Comprehensive testing of HR, Finance, and Inventory modules ensuring data accuracy and operational quality across enterprise resource planning systems.

  • HR, Finance, Inventory module validation
  • Data accuracy verification via SQL
  • End-to-end workflow testing
  • Regression and smoke testing
99% Data Accuracy 3 Modules
E-Commerce Katalon API

E-Commerce Platform Testing

  • Search to checkout flow testing
  • Payment gateway validation
  • Cross-browser compatibility
  • Multi-device testing
80% Bug Reduction 100+ Test Cases

AI & Healthcare Systems
